info.name: TSP — EMVCo Automated Test Suite
info.description: Exhaustive EMVCo-compliant automated test cases for Token Service Provider (TSP) Token Vault. Covers Functional, Negative, Boundary, and Security scenarios with full parameter chaining across all endpoints. Sequence mirrors the original collection: Vault → Transport Key → Certificate → Encrypt Key → Issuer → BIN → Account Range → Token Requestor → Token Use Setup → Token Life Setup → Token Range Setup → Tokenize → Detokenize.

variable.description: AUTO: unique custodian ID, generated at run start

AUTO: 16-digit Luhn-valid PAN starting with generatedBinValue
AUTO: 4-digit issuer code, generated at run start
AUTO: copy of generatedBinValue after BIN creation confirmed
AUTO: internal flag — set to true once test data is seeded
